description.unified: Attacks all frontal enemies in a straight line, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for [1.8 sec->3 sec]. If the target is not a Hero, deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] [No cooldown is incurred->Removes Cooldown]

Deals ??? P.DMG to target and nearby enemies within range and inflict them with [Explosive Meterial] for [7 sec->10 sec], causing them to take [25%->20%] increased P.DMG and additional inflicting Blind for [2.4 sec->4 sec]. [Experiment Success!] [Removes beneficial->Dispels positive] effects from enemies within range.

Attaches a [sticky->Glue] Bomb to a random enemy [After 3 sec, the bomb explodes->that explodes in 3 sec], dealing ??? P.DMG to the target and nearby enemies, [and stunning them->inflicting Stun] for [1.8 sec->3 sec]. If the target is [with->inflicted with] [Explosive Material], deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] [The bomb explodes immediately upon attaching, triggering its effects->Glue Bomb explodes immediately after attachment].

Each [Normal->auto] attack has a 15% chance of firing a [shell->bomb] that deals ??? P.DMG and stuns them for [1.2 sec->2 sec]. [At the end of each skill, attempts an [Experiment]. There is a 50% chance for success, which empowers the next skill. Empowered skills do not attempt an [Experiment]->After each Skill use, Lakrak conducts an experiment. The experiment has a 50% success rate. Upon success, enhances the effects of the next Skill use. Experiment does not occur when Lakrak uses the enhanced Skill].

dark.unified: Blind duration is increased by [1.2 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->1], and [the number of bomb placements is changed to 2->attacks a random target 2 times].
[Shell activation->Activation] chance is [increased->boosted] by 10% and stun duration increases by [0.6 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50% and [recovers->restores] {0} mana on critical hit
[Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases [the duration of Blind->blind duration] by {0} sec.
[Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces [the Heal Rate->Heal Rate] of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: Each time Lakrak succeed an Experiment, his [Attack Speed by 300% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 300->attack rate increase by 300] for 10 sec.

description.unified: Lakrak's chances of successful Experiment are increased by {0}%, and each successful experiment increases his ATK by {1}%, ATK Spd by {2} [(removed) %] and damage against [none-Heroes->none-Heroes] by {3}%. This effect [can stack->stacks] up to 4 times and [cannot be dispelled->is irremovable].
